blurbEn: Solo K-pop icon whose Fire Rabbit day master glows softly under stage lights — a long-burning candle, not a flare.
blurbKo: 솔로 K-pop 아이콘. 일주 丁卯(Fire Rabbit)는 무대의 빛 아래 부드럽게 빛나는 — 폭죽이 아닌 오래 타는 촛불 같은.

blurbEn: BTS visual whose Wood Goat day master carries quiet artistry and a mood that shifts camera language.
blurbKo: 방탄소년단의 비주얼. 일주 乙未(Wood Goat)는 조용한 예술성과 카메라 언어를 바꾸는 분위기를 가집니다.

blurbEn: BLACKPINK's Water Rat pillar runs deep — magnetic intuition, hidden current, unreadable star presence.
blurbKo: 블랙핑크 멤버. 일주 壬子(Water Rat) — 자력 있는 직관과 숨은 수류, 읽히지 않는 스타 존재감.

blurbEn: aespa leader with Earth Pig — soft surface, generous heart, structure built quietly under perfectionism.
blurbKo: 에스파 리더. 일주 己亥(Earth Pig) — 부드러운 표면 아래 너그러운 마음과 완벽주의 속에 조용히 쌓는 구조.

blurbEn: BLACKPINK eldest with Wood Horse — a tall tree riding noon flame, classic warmth meets cinematic poise.
blurbKo: 블랙핑크 맏언니. 일주 甲午(Wood Horse) — 한낮의 불꽃을 탄 큰 나무, 클래식한 따스함과 시네마틱한 균형.

blurbEn: BTS golden maknae — Fire Horse day master burns through camera, dance, and rooms with magnetic warmth.
blurbKo: 방탄 황금막내. 일주 丙午(Fire Horse) — 카메라·댄스·공간을 자력 있는 따뜻함으로 태우는 불꽃.

blurbEn: BLACKPINK vocalist with Wood Monkey — inventive curiosity, vocal craft, restless creative momentum.
blurbKo: 블랙핑크 보컬. 일주 甲申(Wood Monkey) — 발명가적 호기심, 보컬 장인 정신, 가만히 있지 못하는 창작 추진력.

blurbEn: Global icon performer with Earth Dragon pillar — strategic depth, slow-build authority, dance precision.
blurbKo: 글로벌 아이콘 퍼포머. 일주 戊辰(Earth Dragon) — 전략적 깊이, 천천히 쌓는 권위, 정밀한 댄스.

blurbEn: Actor/2PM member with Metal Tiger — sharp focus, decisive movement, leadership through quiet pressure.
blurbKo: 배우 겸 2PM 멤버. 일주 庚寅(Metal Tiger) — 날카로운 집중, 결단력 있는 움직임, 조용한 압력의 리더십.

blurbEn: K-drama icon whose Wood Dragon pillar holds storms inside a perfectly still frame — long career, slow burn.
blurbKo: K-드라마 아이콘. 일주 甲辰(Wood Dragon) — 정적인 프레임 안에 폭풍을 담은 — 길고 느린 곡선의 커리어.

blurbEn: Actor with Wood Snake pillar — refined charisma, intelligent emotional layers, scenes deepen on rewatch.
blurbKo: 배우. 일주 乙巳(Wood Snake) — 정제된 카리스마, 지적인 감정의 결, 다시 볼수록 깊어지는 장면.

blurbEn: Figure skating legend — Water Rooster pillar reads as deep current + precision blade. Every performance broadcasts decades of disciplined water.
blurbKo: 피겨스케이팅 전설. 일주 癸酉(Water Rooster) — 깊은 수류와 정밀한 칼날의 결합. 매 연기마다 수십 년의 절제된 물의.

blurbEn: Premier League captain — Wood Rooster day master powers precision movement and tactical sharpness on global stages.
blurbKo: 프리미어리그 주장. 일주 乙酉(Wood Rooster) — 세계 무대에서의 정밀한 움직임과 전술적 예리함을 만드는 일간.

blurbEn: Stray Kids visual/dancer with Fire Ox — candle in winter soil, slow-build glow, artistic mood close-ups.
blurbKo: 스트레이키즈 비주얼·댄서. 일주 丁丑(Fire Ox) — 겨울 흙 속의 촛불, 천천히 쌓이는 빛, 예술적 분위기의 클로즈업.

blurbEn: Solo artist with Wood Rabbit — willow under moonlight, signature softness, brand identity that refuses dilution.
blurbKo: 솔로 아티스트. 일주 乙卯(Wood Rabbit) — 달빛 아래의 버드나무, 시그니처 부드러움, 희석되지 않는 브랜드 정체성.

blurbEn: K-pop 2nd-gen queen — Earth Dragon pillar reads as enduring brand authority, vocal kingmaker, mountain shelter.
blurbKo: K-pop 2세대 여왕. 일주 戊辰(Earth Dragon) — 변하지 않는 브랜드 권위, 보컬계의 킹메이커, 큰 산의 안식처.

blurbEn: K-pop architect — Wood Snake pillar carries refined intellect + cultural authorship beyond charts.
blurbKo: K-pop 건축가. 일주 乙巳(Wood Snake) — 정제된 지성과 차트를 넘어선 문화적 저자성.

blurbEn: BTS eldest — Wood Tiger pillar mixes humor, vocal craft, ambitious staying power, leadership without force.
blurbKo: 방탄 맏형. 일주 甲寅(Wood Tiger) — 유머, 보컬 장인 정신, 야망과 지속력, 강압 없는 리더십.

blurbEn: Actor whose Earth Tiger delivers grounded gravity with subtle modern wit, sageuk and contemporary balance.
blurbKo: 배우. 일주 戊寅(Earth Tiger) — 안정된 무게감과 섬세한 현대적 위트, 사극과 현대의 균형.

blurbEn: Squid Game lead with Metal Dragon pillar — late-career global icon arc, strategic intensity, brand-defining performance.

blurbEn: NewJeans member Minji — leader with a quiet confidence and elegant presence. Day master 丙戌 (Fire Dog) — Fire × Dog.
blurbKo: NewJeans 민지. 일주 丙戌 — 태양 불과 개띠 결합. 리더로서 조용한 자신감과 우아한 존재감.

blurbEn: NewJeans member Hanni — warm cosmopolitan smile that lifts every track. Day master 戊午 (Earth Horse) — Earth × Horse.

blurbEn: NewJeans member Danielle — bilingual brightness with a soft-rebel edge. Day master 乙丑 (Wood Ox) — Wood × Ox.

blurbEn: NewJeans member Haerin — feline mystery, the camera reads more than the line. Day master 甲辰 (Wood Dragon) — Wood × Dragon.

blurbEn: NewJeans member Hyein — the youngest with grown-up stage instincts. Day master 辛卯 (Metal Rabbit) — Metal × Rabbit.

blurbEn: IVE member Yujin — leader who carries the room with a single beat. Day master 丁丑 (Fire Ox) — Fire × Ox.

blurbEn: IVE member Gaeul — sharp dancer whose stage edge cuts cleanly. Day master 乙未 (Wood Goat) — Wood × Goat.

blurbEn: IVE member Rei — Tokyo-born flow with a quiet rapper backbone. Day master 壬子 (Water Rat) — Water × Rat.

blurbEn: IVE member Wonyoung — luminous it-girl whose presence resets every photo line. Day master 壬午 (Water Horse) — Water × Horse.

blurbEn: IVE member Liz — main vocal whose tone floats above the mix. Day master 甲辰 (Wood Dragon) — Wood × Dragon.

blurbEn: LE SSERAFIM member Sakura — seasoned center whose two-nation career deepens every cut. Day master 乙丑 (Wood Ox) — Wood × Ox.

blurbEn: LE SSERAFIM member Kazuha — trained dancer turned idol — every line lands clean. Day master 甲寅 (Wood Tiger) — Wood × Tiger.

blurbEn: LE SSERAFIM member Eunchae — the smile-energy maknae who turns chaos into camera magic. Day master 癸卯 (Water Rabbit) — Water × Rabbit.

blurbEn: ITZY member Yeji — leader fox-eye intensity, dance line lead. Day master 甲申 (Wood Monkey) — Wood × Monkey.

blurbEn: ITZY member Lia — honey-colored main vocal with a warm core. Day master 庚辰 (Metal Dragon) — Metal × Dragon.

blurbEn: ITZY member Ryujin — fearless dance line presence. Day master 庚戌 (Metal Dog) — Metal × Dog.

blurbEn: ITZY member Chaeryeong — main dancer whose lines flow like ink. Day master 庚午 (Metal Horse) — Metal × Horse.

blurbEn: ITZY member Yuna — visual maknae with surprising vocal range. Day master 丙辰 (Fire Dragon) — Fire × Dragon.

blurbEn: aespa member Winter — icy clean lead vocal with sharp expressions. Day master 甲子 (Wood Rat) — Wood × Rat.

blurbEn: aespa member Ningning — main vocal powerhouse from China. Day master 甲子 (Wood Rat) — Wood × Rat.

blurbEn: ENHYPEN member Jay — bilingual main rapper with stage edge. Day master 戊午 (Earth Horse) — Earth × Horse.

blurbEn: ENHYPEN member Jake — Aussie-Korean charm with bright stage timing. Day master 丁亥 (Fire Pig) — Fire × Pig.

blurbEn: ENHYPEN member Sunghoon — former figure skater with poised camera face. Day master 庚戌 (Metal Dog) — Metal × Dog.

blurbEn: ENHYPEN member Sunoo — bright eye-smile melts the camera. Day master 戊辰 (Earth Dragon) — Earth × Dragon.

blurbEn: ENHYPEN member Jungwon — youngest-leader paradox — quiet authority. Day master 戊午 (Earth Horse) — Earth × Horse.

blurbEn: ENHYPEN member Niki — youngest powerhouse dancer from Japan. Day master 丁卯 (Fire Rabbit) — Fire × Rabbit.

blurbEn: SEVENTEEN member Joshua — LA-born vocal — soft surface, deep musicality. Day master 乙未 (Wood Goat) — Wood × Goat.

blurbEn: SEVENTEEN member Mingyu — tall visual rapper with kitchen-warmth aura. Day master 戊寅 (Earth Tiger) — Earth × Tiger.

blurbEn: SEVENTEEN member DK — main vocal whose musical-theater belt soars. Day master 辛卯 (Metal Rabbit) — Metal × Rabbit.

blurbEn: TXT member Yeonjun — main dancer with tigerish stage presence. Day master 戊辰 (Earth Dragon) — Earth × Dragon.

blurbEn: TXT member Soobin — bunny-leader with quiet vocal warmth. Day master 丁酉 (Fire Rooster) — Fire × Rooster.

blurbEn: TXT member Beomgyu — mood-maker guitar fan and clean vocal. Day master 乙亥 (Wood Pig) — Wood × Pig.

blurbEn: TXT member Taehyun — lead vocal with sharp ML-debate logic in interviews. Day master 甲辰 (Wood Dragon) — Wood × Dragon.

blurbEn: TXT member Hueningkai — tri-cultural maknae main vocal — Hawaii-Korea-China. Day master 甲寅 (Wood Tiger) — Wood × Tiger.

blurbEn: RIIZE member Wonbin — visual all-rounder with k-drama-lead face. Day master 乙丑 (Wood Ox) — Wood × Ox.

blurbEn: RIIZE member Anton — Korean-American multi-instrumentalist maknae line. Day master 壬午 (Water Horse) — Water × Horse.
